upcoming.title: Next pickup window
upcoming.note: Set cart curbside the night before service and keep lid closed.

upcoming.title: Route notice on file
upcoming.note: Loose bagged material should be secured inside the cart to avoid wind scatter.

notices.title: Holiday route changes
notices.body: If a holiday route moves, the office will post the updated schedule on the route updates page and send account notices.

notices.title: Billing questions
notices.body: Invoice questions can be submitted through the contact page. Include the invoice number and service address for faster review.

notices.title: Set-out reminder
notices.body: Do not overload carts. Material above the lid line may not be serviced until it is corrected.
